MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2017 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-19-2017 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514, JUDGE STEPHEN M. MURPHY FOR DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING AS TO THE CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT WEST COM 1520 LLC. JOEL DAVID BIERER APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WEST COM 1520, LLC AND DEFENDANT KWOK HUNG SZETO. TED KIM, COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, IS PRESENT IN COURT. NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED AS TO THE COMPLAINT ONLY. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206) [***CASE IS DISMISSED AS TO THE COMPLAINT.***]

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-05-2017 IN DEPT. 206. DEFENDANTS KWOK SZETO AND WEST COM 1520 LLC'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. JOEL DAVID BIERER APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT/CROSS-COMPLAINANT WEST COM 1520, LLC AND DEFENDANT KWOK HUNG SZETO. TED KIM, COURT CERTIFIED KOREAN INTERPRETER, WITH OATH ON FILE, IS PRESENT IN COURT. NO APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ORDERED THE CASE DISMISSED AS TO THE COMPLAINT ONLY. MR. BIERER REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT PAPERS WERE SERVED AT MR. CHUNG'S ADDRESS OF GOLDEN GATE, BUT HE WAS NOT THERE AT THAT TIME ACCORDING TO THE WIFE OF MR. CHUNG. MR. BIERER HANDED THE PAPERS TO THE WIFE AND MR. BIERER ALSO CALLED MR. CHUNG EVERY DAY AND THERE WAS NO CALL BACK FROM MR. CHUNG. THE COURT ORDERED THE MATTER FOR A DEFAULT PROVE-UP HEARING AS TO THE CROSS-COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS-COMPLAINANT WEST COM 1520 LLC. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHOW THAT PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE "IRRELEVANT, FALSE OR IMPROPER." CROSS-COMPLAINTS ARE NOT ALLOWED IN UNLAWFUL DETAINER. KNOWLES V. ROBINSON (1963) 60 CAL. 2D 620. calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-19-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar as regularly scheduled this day for trial/no appearance by cross-defendant. The complaint was dismissed June 5, 2017.
Department 514; Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840.
Witnesses Kwok Hung Szeto and Helen Chan sworn and examined on behalf of the Cross-Complainant.
Joel David Bierer, Esq., appearing for Cross-complainant West-Com 1520 LLC.
No appearance on behalf of or by Cross-Defendant In Bum Chung.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Cross-complainant and against Cross-Defendant In Bum Chung as follows:
Principal $45,257.50
Pre-Judgment Interest $3,246.14
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $1729.05
Total Judgment in the amount of $50,232.69
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion To Continue Trial
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Continue Trial
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Continued To Jun-05-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-07-2016 Continued To Jun-05-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Set For Trial On Jan-17-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Strike Entire Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 435(A)(2) And Request For Judicial Notlce
Off Calendar May-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT WEST-COM 1520 LLC, KWOK SZETO Notice Of Motion To Strike Entire Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 435(A)(2) And Request For Judicial Notlce is Denied, 10 days to answer. Moving party failed to show that Plaintiff's claims are "irrelevant, false or improper." Cross-complaints are not allowed in unlawful detainer. Knowles v. Robinson (1963) 60 Cal. 2d 620. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Entire Complaint Pursuant To Ccp 435(A)(2) And Request For Judicial Notlce
Off Calendar Apr-28-2016 Continued To May-31-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS WEST-COM 1520 LLC and KWOK SZETO'S Motion To Strike Entire Complaint Pursuant To CCP 435(A)(2) And Request For Judicial Notice will be heard in Department 501, the Housing Court, on May 31, 2016. All further motions in this case should be noticed to be heard in Department 501.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
